content: Just as Self-Refine enables LLMs to iteratively polish raw outputs without external training data by leveraging intrinsic self-feedback, Reflexion’s dynamic self-reflection memory can be integrated to let Self-Refine retain and reuse high-quality feedback from past refinement iterations across different tasks, rather than starting the feedback process from scratch for every new output. This creates a hierarchical self-improvement system where lightweight, training-free iterative refinement is bootstrapped by accumulated reflective memory.
